rationale: Educ. Code §12.062 governs revision of school chartels. It is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b); no conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 12.062. REVISION. (a) A charter granted under Section 12.052 or 12.053 may be revised:
_note: Rule text concerns charter revision procedures, not property tax or homestead exemptions. No conflict with proposed change.
